name: agent-loop
description: Bounded, resumable OpenAI-native coding loops for Codex with installer, doctor, demo, shorthand budgets, shell, and apply_patch support.

interface.shortDescription: Use $agent-loop for bounded Claude-Code-style coding loops with doctor, demo, shorthand budgets, shell, and approval pauses.
interface.longDescription: Agent Loop adds a reusable Codex skill, $agent-loop, for bounded, resumable OpenAI-native coding loops. It also includes a one-command installer, a doctor command for setup checks, a first-run demo, shorthand budgets like 10m and 5t, local run logs, and approval pauses before writes.
defaultPrompt: Use $agent-loop 10m fix the failing tests and verify the result
